feat.name: Order Magic
feat.text: You have delved deeper into the teaching of a new order, gaining access to a coveted order spell. Choose an order you have selected with Order Explorer. You gain the initial order spell from that order.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

feat.special: You can take this feat multiple times. Each time you do, you must choose a different order you have selected with Order Explorer.
